summary: Verified 5 fixes from cycle 3. All 5 features are functionally present and working. 1 regression found: Settings page Keyboard Shortcuts table still shows old Cmd+Shift shortcuts while Help panel and bottom bar correctly show new Cmd-only shortcuts.

fixes_verified.description: New Sprint button added to Sprints tab with creation dialog
evidence: New Sprint button visible in Sprints sub-tab of Teams view
Dialog opens with Sprint Goal text input, Model selector (opus/sonnet), Agent picker (Orchestrator required + Frontend/Backend/QA Tester/Security toggleable)
Cost warning: 'Launches opus orchestrator session. Uses API credits.'
Start Sprint button disabled until goal is filled, then enables
Agent count updates dynamically (AGENTS (1) -> AGENTS (2))
Cancel button closes dialog cleanly

fixes_verified.description: Per-session cost badges in Running on Machine section
evidence: Running on Machine section shows 2 sessions with individual cost badges
Session 1: opus, 3h 55m uptime, $119.9
Session 2: opus, 46m uptime, $11.7
Total cost $131.6 shown in top bar matches sum of individual costs

fixes_verified.description: Per-session cost badges visible in Running on Machine
evidence: Same as TASK-1 - per-process cost now visible alongside each session entry
Cost shown as '$119.9' and '$11.7' next to each session

fixes_verified.description: Peak/off-peak label improved with API prefix and tooltip
evidence: Label now reads 'API: Off-Peak' (previously just 'Off-Peak')
Tooltip title: 'Off-Peak -- Normal Speed'
Tooltip body: 'Anthropic API rate limits are stricter during peak hours (5am-11am Pacific). Expect slower responses and more throttling during peak.'
Shows local peak window times: '20:00 - 02:00'

fixes_verified.description: Usage indicator has tooltip explaining CPU/memory values
evidence: Usage button shows '22% | 23.8/24GB'
Tooltip title: 'System Resources'
Shows CPU usage: '22%'
Shows Memory: '23.8 / 24 GB (99%)'
Includes CTA: 'Click for full system monitor in Settings.'

fixes_verified.description: Keyboard shortcuts changed to Cmd+N, Cmd+K, Cmd+\
evidence: Help panel correctly shows: Cmd+N (New session), Cmd+K (Command palette), Cmd+\ (Toggle sidebar)
Bottom bar correctly shows: Cmd K commands, Cmd N new session
Empty state text correctly says: 'Press Cmd+N to launch or Cmd+K for commands.'
REGRESSION: Settings page Keyboard Shortcuts table still shows OLD shortcuts: Cmd+Shift+N, Cmd+Shift+K, Cmd+Shift+\

bugs_found.description: Settings page Keyboard Shortcuts table shows stale Cmd+Shift shortcuts (Cmd+Shift+N, Cmd+Shift+K, Cmd+Shift+\) while Help panel and bottom bar correctly show new Cmd-only shortcuts (Cmd+N, Cmd+K, Cmd+\). Inconsistent shortcut display confuses users.
bugs_found.expected: Shortcuts should match Help panel: Cmd+N, Cmd+K, Cmd+\

identity_compliance.notes: All IDENTITY.md requirements appear met. Dark theme consistent, monospace font used throughout, amber accent for active states, compact spacing.

TASK-4_new_sprint.loading_state: Not tested (did not submit sprint to avoid API cost)
TASK-4_new_sprint.keyboard_navigation: Dialog closable with Esc (via close button)
TASK-4_new_sprint.back_undo: Cancel returns to sprint list cleanly

TASK-9_keyboard_shortcuts.happy_path: Partial - Help panel and bottom bar correct, Settings table stale
TASK-9_keyboard_shortcuts.keyboard_navigation: Shortcuts listed correctly in Help panel

overall_notes: All 5 targeted fixes are functionally working. 4 fully verified, 1 partially verified (TASK-9 has inconsistency in Settings page). No regressions detected from previous verified fixes (TASK-2, TASK-3, TASK-5, TASK-6 all still working). 1 new MEDIUM bug found (TASK-37).
